name: weclapp Cloud ERP
description: Access weclapp Cloud ERP data including parties (customers/suppliers), sales orders, invoices, and articles. Popular ERP for German SMBs.

tools.name: weclapp_list_customers
tools.description: List parties (customers/suppliers/contacts) from weclapp ERP. In API v2 customers and suppliers are unified under /party ŌĆö pass filter='customerNumber-notnull=' to restrict to customers, or filter='supplierNumber-notnull=' for suppliers (the -null/-notnull operators take an EMPTY value ŌĆö NOT '=true'). Use `properties` to limit returned fields (e.g. 'id,customerNumber,company,firstName,lastName,email') to reduce payload size.

properties.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return, e.g. 'id,customerNumber,company,firstName,lastName,email'

filter.description: weclapp v2 filter expression. The property+operator IS the param name (no 'filter=' wrapper). Examples: 'partyType-eq=ORGANIZATION', 'customerNumber-notnull=' ŌĆö note the -null/-notnull operators take an EMPTY value, not '=true'.

sort.description: Sort field, prefix with '-' for descending (e.g. '-createdDate')

tools.name: weclapp_get_customer
tools.description: Get a specific party (customer/supplier/contact) by ID. In API v2 this maps to /party/id/{id}.

tools.name: weclapp_list_sales_orders
tools.description: List sales orders from weclapp ERP. Returns order numbers, amounts, status and the record address. NOTE: salesOrder has NO 'customerName' field ŌĆö do not request it in `properties` (weclapp returns 400). The customer's name is in `recordAddress`; the customer link is `customerId`. Use `properties` to limit fields and `filter` to narrow results (e.g. 'orderNumber-eq=SO-1042'). Date fields are Unix epoch milliseconds (e.g. 'orderDate-gt=1767225600000').

properties.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

sort.description: Sort field, prefix with '-' for descending

tools.name: weclapp_list_invoices
tools.description: List sales invoices from weclapp ERP. Returns invoice numbers, amounts, due dates, and payment status. NOTE: invoice has NO 'customerName' field ŌĆö do not request it in `properties` (weclapp returns 400); the name is in `recordAddress`, the link is `customerId`. Use `filter` for queries like 'paid-eq=false'. Date fields are Unix epoch milliseconds (e.g. 'invoiceDate-gt=1767225600000' for 2026-01-01).

properties.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

filter.description: weclapp filter. The property+operator IS the param name, so pass it as `property-operator=value` (NOT a `filter=` wrapper). Operators: -eq -ne -gt -lt -ge -le -like -ilike -in -notin -null -notnull (the -null/-notnull operators take an EMPTY value, e.g. 'articleNumber-notnull='). Examples: 'articleNumber-eq=A5101', 'productionArticle-eq=true', 'name-ilike=%hammer%'. Combine with '&'.

sort.description: Sort field, prefix with '-' for descending

tools.name: weclapp_list_articles
tools.description: List articles (products) from weclapp ERP. Returns article numbers, names, prices, and stock info. Use `filter` like 'articleNumber-eq=ABC123' for SKU lookups.

properties.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

filter.description: weclapp filter. The property+operator IS the param name, so pass it as `property-operator=value` (NOT a `filter=` wrapper). Operators: -eq -ne -gt -lt -ge -le -like -ilike -in -notin -null -notnull (the -null/-notnull operators take an EMPTY value, e.g. 'articleNumber-notnull='). Examples: 'articleNumber-eq=A5101', 'productionArticle-eq=true', 'name-ilike=%hammer%'. Combine with '&'.

sort.description: Sort field, prefix with '-' for descending

tools.name: weclapp_get_article
tools.description: Get a specific article (product) by ID, including stock, pricing, and warehouse data.

tools.name: weclapp_list_quotations
tools.description: List sales quotations (Angebote) from weclapp ERP. Returns quotation numbers, amounts, status and the record address. NOTE: a quotation has NO 'customerName' field ŌĆö the customer's name is in `recordAddress`, the link is `customerId`; do not request 'customerName' in `properties`. Date fields are Unix epoch milliseconds (e.g. 'quotationDate-gt=1767225600000' for 2026-01-01).

properties.description: Comma-separated weclapp field names to limit the response (omit to return all fields). Use real field names only ŌĆö requesting a non-existent property returns a 400.

filter.description: weclapp filter. The property+operator IS the param name, so pass it as `property-operator=value` (NOT a `filter=` wrapper). Operators: -eq -ne -gt -lt -ge -le -like -ilike -in -notin -null -notnull (the -null/-notnull operators take an EMPTY value, e.g. 'quotationNumber-notnull='). Examples: 'status-eq=ORDER_CONFIRMATION_PRINTED', 'quotationNumber-eq=AN-1042'. Combine with '&'.

sort.description: Sort field, prefix with '-' for descending

tools.name: weclapp_get_quotation
tools.description: Get a single sales quotation (Angebot) by ID, including positions, amounts and status.

tools.name: weclapp_list_recurring_invoices
tools.description: List recurring invoices (wiederkehrende Rechnungen / Abo-Rechnungen) from weclapp ERP ŌĆö the templates that periodically generate sales invoices. Returns interval, next run, amounts and status. NOTE: no 'customerName' field ŌĆö the name is in `recordAddress`, the link is `customerId`. Date fields are Unix epoch milliseconds.

properties.description: Comma-separated weclapp field names to limit the response (omit to return all fields). Use real field names only ŌĆö requesting a non-existent property returns a 400.

filter.description: weclapp filter. The property+operator IS the param name, so pass it as `property-operator=value` (NOT a `filter=` wrapper). Operators: -eq -ne -gt -lt -ge -le -like -ilike -in -notin -null -notnull (the -null/-notnull operators take an EMPTY value, e.g. 'customerId-notnull='). Combine with '&'.

sort.description: Sort field, prefix with '-' for descending

tools.name: weclapp_get_recurring_invoice
tools.description: Get a single recurring invoice (wiederkehrende Rechnung) by ID, including its interval, next execution date and template positions.

recurringInvoiceId.description: The weclapp recurring invoice ID (numeric string)

tools.name: weclapp_list_opportunities
tools.description: List sales opportunities (Verkaufschancen) from weclapp CRM. Returns name, stage/status, expected value and the linked customer. NOTE: the linked party is referenced by `customerId` / `contactId`, not a name field. Date fields are Unix epoch milliseconds.

properties.description: Comma-separated weclapp field names to limit the response (omit to return all fields). Use real field names only ŌĆö requesting a non-existent property returns a 400.

filter.description: weclapp filter. The property+operator IS the param name, so pass it as `property-operator=value` (NOT a `filter=` wrapper). Operators: -eq -ne -gt -lt -ge -le -like -ilike -in -notin -null -notnull (the -null/-notnull operators take an EMPTY value, e.g. 'customerId-notnull='). Combine with '&'.

sort.description: Sort field, prefix with '-' for descending
